description_long: This shotgun features a robust, dark metal barrel with a perforated heat shield running along its length, providing both protection and a tactical appearance. The receiver is compact and houses a drum magazine, which is prominently visible and suggests a high-capacity feeding system. The stock is made of polished wood, extending smoothly from the receiver and offering a traditional, ergonomic grip. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionate, enclosing a single trigger and providing ample space for finger placement. The overall design combines modern tactical elements, such as the drum magazine and vented barrel, with classic wooden furniture. The finish is a mix of matte black metal and rich brown wood, giving the shotgun a visually striking and functional look.
description: A tactical shotgun with a vented metal barrel, drum magazine, and polished wooden stock, blending modern and classic design elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, drum magazine, and vented barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the width of the stock and the circular profile of the drum magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, drum magazine, and the full length of the vented barrel.
description_view_3: Barrel-end view focusing on the muzzle, vented heat shield, and the drum magazine's side profile.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a vented heat shield along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
